MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative For Summary Adjudication - Notice Of Motion
Off Calendar Feb-23-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
David Yen, Esq. 415-433-0444 of the Cartwright Law Firm Inc. for Plaintiff Frank Pietronigro.
Michael Shepherd, Esq. 510-457-3464 of Hartsuyker Stratman & Williams-Abrego for Defendant WOODHOUSE FISH COMPANY INC.

RULING - A R G U E D. Defendant Argues bacteria and what consumers reasonably expect. Plaintiff argues mishandling. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT WOODHOUSE FISH COMPANY INC.'s MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative For Summary Adjudication is taken under submission.* (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript)

Plaintiff to submit a proposed order. Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. (D302/RBU)

*After the hearing, the Court signs an Order Re: Defendant Woodhouse Fish Company, Inc's motion for summary judgment or alternatively, summary adjudication - Denied in it's entirety. (see scanned order for details)*
